title: AI Research Engineer, Large Language Models
description: We are seeking a Research Engineer to join our generative AI team. You will work on pre-training and fine-tuning state-of-the-art Large Language Models. Requirements: PhD in Computer Science or equivalent research experience. Expert in Python and PyTorch. Experience with Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is highly preferred.

title: Machine Learning Engineer - Reinforcement Learning
description: Join our robotics group to design and implement reinforcement learning algorithms for navigation. Responsibilities include building simulation environments and training deep RL models. Qualifications: Strong programming skills in Python and PyTorch, experience training large scale deep neural networks, and understanding of RL fundamentals.

title: Applied Scientist - Computer Vision
description: Looking for an Applied Scientist to develop vision algorithms for medical imaging. The ideal candidate has experience with convolutional neural networks and object detection. Requirement: PhD or Masters in Computer Science or related. Python, PyTorch, OpenCV required.

title: Senior Java Software Engineer
description: Seeking a Senior Backend Engineer to maintain and scale our enterprise banking platform. Requirements: 8+ years of experience with Java, Spring Boot, microservices architecture, and SQL database optimization.

title: Frontend React Web Developer
description: Looking for a creative frontend developer to build responsive web interfaces for client websites. Requirements: Proficient in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and modern UI libraries like Tailwind CSS.
